case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. JOHN DEVORE ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT DEVORE, JOHN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-11-2018
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-05-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-05-2018 CONTINUED TO AUG-07-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-07-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
